summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Community Hub feature and regression tests for Dashboard and Rostering. All 18 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified Community Hub page loads correctly with Forum and Events tabs, 5 default categories, New Discussion dialog, Create Event dialog (admin only), and post creation flow.
critical_code_review_comments: Community Hub feature properly implements Forum and Events tabs with correct data-testid attributes
Forum categories auto-create 5 defaults on first load: Announcements, General Discussion, NDIS Updates, Best Practices, Support & Help
Create Event button correctly restricted to admin/coordinator roles
Post creation flow works correctly with category selection, title, content fields
Event registration/unregistration endpoints working with proper attendee tracking
Dashboard and Rostering pages continue to work correctly (regression tests pass)
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_community_hub.py - Created comprehensive test suite for Community Hub APIs
seed_data_creation: Test posts and events created during testing were cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Community Hub feature fully tested. Backend APIs working: /api/forum/categories (returns 5 default categories), /api/forum/posts (CRUD), /api/forum/posts/{id}/replies (create replies), /api/community/events (CRUD with registration). Frontend verified: Community Hub page with Forum/Events tabs, Categories sidebar with 5 categories, New Discussion dialog with category/title/content fields, Create Event dialog (admin only) with event type/title/description/date/time/duration/location/meeting link fields. Dashboard shows 9 clients, 9 staff, 0 upcoming shifts, 1 pending invoice. Rostering shows shift table with export functionality.

tests: Forum tab loads with 5 default categories
Categories: Announcements, General Discussion, NDIS Updates, Best Practices, Support & Help
New Discussion button opens dialog with category, title, content fields
Forum posts can be created and displayed in list
Post detail view shows replies and view count
Search and filter by category working
Create Event button visible for admin users
Create Event dialog has all required fields (type, title, description, date, time, duration, location, meeting link)
Event types supported: webinar, meetup, training, workshop
Stats display: Total Clients (9), Total Staff (9), Upcoming Shifts (0), Pending Invoices (1)
Rostering page loads with shift table
Shift data displays correctly with date/time, client, staff, service, duration, status

mocked_apis_note: None - all APIs are real and functional
